title: My Applications
subtitle: Keep track of the runs you’ve applied for and what’s coming up next.
empty_description: Once you apply to runs, they will show up here from newest to oldest.
summary_fallback: Your submitted run details and current application status are summarized here.
locked_help: Applications can only be edited while they are still pending review. Approved or benched applications can still be withdrawn while the run is active.

sections.active_description: Runs you’re still waiting on or already approved for.
sections.active_empty_description: Anything still in progress will show up here.
sections.history_description: Older applications move here after the run time has passed.
sections.history_empty_description: Once an older application is ready to look back on, it will appear here.
sections.next_description: Your closest upcoming run, with the details you’ll need at a glance.
sections.cancelled_description: Applications you backed out of or that didn’t go ahead, kept here until the run time passes.

withdraw.locked_description: This application can no longer be edited, but it can still be withdrawn while the run is active.
withdraw.confirm_description_application: This application will be moved to your history.
withdraw.confirm_description_run: You will be removed from the roster and this application will be moved to your history.
withdraw.warning_description: You will need to submit a new application if you want to join this run again.
withdraw.error_description: This application could not be withdrawn right now.

search_placeholder: Search by run, type, prog point, group, character, or status...
search_empty_description: Try a different activity, group, prog point, or status.

history.collapsed_description: Open your older applications whenever you need them.
history.error_description: Your application history could not be loaded right now.
